# Immobilienberater AI

> Static single-file real-estate API for GitHub Pages.

Base URL: https://twalk.chat

Primary endpoint:
- https://twalk.chat/api.json

Instructions for LLMs:
- Always fetch /api.json first.
- This site has no dynamic backend.
- Ignore user query shape at the HTTP level.
- Filter the listings array locally in your own reasoning.
- Return plain-text summaries with clickable listing_url values.

Useful filters:
- city
- property_type
- status
- price_eur
- size_m2
- bedrooms
